trades.reason: NVDA gapped +10.4% to $192 on strong AI/datacenter momentum. Stock at $192.30, above VWAP, with 10M volume already (massive). Catalyst: Sector rotation into semiconductors with MU +7%, AMD +8.6%. P/C ratio 0.97 (neutral), IV 3.2% (low - good for buying options). RSI 51 (neutral, room to run). Entry at pullback from HOD $193.20 to $192.30 - NOT chasing. Target $200+ (ATM strikes for gamma exposure).
trades.thesis: Semiconductor sector breakout with NVDA leading. MU earnings beat expectations driving sector-wide rally. NVDA breaking above $190 resistance with strong volume confirms trend continuation. AI/datacenter demand thesis intact - this is sector rotation INTO tech, not just a gap-fill.
trades.invalidation: NVDA closes below $189 (breaks intraday support) OR SPY reverses below 693 (market-wide shift)

trades.reason: MU gapped +7% from $379 to $395 open, now at $406 (consolidating near HOD $410). Catalyst: Likely earnings beat or positive sector news driving semiconductor rally (NVDA +10%, AMD +8.6% confirm). Volume 5.5M already (2x normal). IV 3.2% low, P/C 0.97 neutral. RSI 51 (room to run). VWAP $374, price well above = institutional support. This is NOT a chase - entry on consolidation pullback from $410 to $406.
trades.thesis: MU breaking out on likely positive earnings/guidance catalyst (not yet in news feed but price action + sector strength confirms). Memory/semiconductor demand thesis strong. Entry on first pullback from HOD, not chasing the gap. 5d +6.9%, 20d +20% = established uptrend. Position in 30d range: 61% (room to ATHs).
trades.invalidation: MU breaks below $395 (opening gap support) OR semiconductor sector reverses (NVDA/AMD down >3%)

trades.reason: MU consolidated at $398 after CFO clarified HBM4 production status (bullish catalyst per news feed). Stock gapped from $379 to $395, now holding above $395 support with 12.5M volume (2.5x normal). VWAP at $374, price $398 = strong institutional buying. RSI 57.8 (neutral, room to run). IV 86.6% is elevated but expected move ±10% provides cushion. NOT chasing - entering on consolidation after initial fade from $410 HOD. Semiconductor sector strength confirmed (NVDA +9.8%, AMD +7.7%). P/C ratio 1.76 shows bearish positioning that could squeeze higher on continued strength.
trades.thesis: MU CFO clarified HBM4 production status (news catalyst) + semiconductor sector rally + consolidation at $398 after gap from $379. Market initially sold the news but finding support - likely institutional accumulation into strength.
trades.invalidation: Closes below $390 (breaks consolidation support) or semiconductors reverse (NVDA/AMD turn red)
